notes: Default gameplay profile. Generate a fresh source strip with at least one full frame of empty space between neighboring visible poses before cleanup/repack.
Expanded action profile for large body motion, weapons, wings, tails, leaps, spells, flashes, and special effects. Use one fixed scale across the job.
Medium monster gameplay profile. Use for monsters about 2 times character size. Preserve one fixed scale across the job and keep at least one selected-frame width of empty source spacing.
Medium monster expanded action profile. Use for 2x monsters with large attacks, spells, wings, tails, leaps, flashes, and special effects. Do not shrink the monster to fit smaller frames.
Large monster gameplay profile. Use for monsters about 3 times character size. Preserve one fixed scale across the job and keep at least one selected-frame width of empty source spacing.

Large monster expanded action profile. Use for 3x monsters with large attacks, boulders, heavy impacts, spells, wings, tails, leaps, flashes, and special effects. Do not shrink the monster to fit smaller frames.
